title: The Iran War is Forcing Energy-Importing Countries to Turn Inward
summary_full: The Iran war is pushing countries to prioritize domestic energy in order to protect themselves from volatile oil and natural gas markets.
summary_public: The Iran war is pushing countries to prioritize domestic energy in order to protect themselves from volatile oil and natural gas markets.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: The Iran war is forcing energy-importing countries to turn inward
